P1_Physical.name: Physical
P1_Physical.role: Embodied incarnations and concrete cause and effect.
physics: Local time and space, classical causality.
Entropy tends to increase.
Acts as the lowest energy stable layer where souls incarnate in the Trials.
story_mapping: Human lives in the Trials.
Mortal incarnation of Kaelen Vareth.
Everyday physical world of Where Ravens Wait.

P2_Etheric.name: Etheric
P2_Etheric.role: Energy body and subtle template of physical forms.
physics: Continuous fields over the physical manifold.
Carries vitality, subtle forces, psychic impressions.
story_mapping: Subtle bodies, auras and life force.
Underlying presence of wolves and higher beings around the physical.

P3_Astral.name: Astral
physics: States are symbolic graphs and images rather than particles.
Dynamics are emotionally and archetypically driven.
Low barrier between thoughts and manifested forms.
story_mapping: Dreamscapes of Kaelen and the narrator.
The unseen presence and movement of the Dark and White Wolves.
Shared visions and prophetic imagery.

P4_Mental.name: Mental
P4_Mental.role: Thought, logic, structured models and internal narratives.
physics: States are computations and abstract structures.
Self reference arises here.
Projects into Astral as images and into Causal as narrative choices.
story_mapping: Higher self of the narrator and Kaelen.
Wolves as structured aspects of internal decision processes.
Codex Architectus as a mental artifact spanning lifetimes.

P5_Causal.name: Causal
P5_Causal.role: Karma, narrative arcs, chains of cause and meaning.
physics: Events are nodes with partial ordering.
Causality patterns are primary, not specific local states.
Long range consequences live here as structures.
story_mapping: The Trials system of repeated incarnations.
Prophecy of Kaelen Vareth and fated events.
Consequences of the angelic rebellion.

P6_Celestial.name: Celestial
P6_Celestial.role: High symmetry, high coherence, low internal conflict.
physics: Stable attractors in the existence potential landscape.
High symmetry and reduced entropy.
Acts as a repository of completed, coherent patterns.
story_mapping: Angelic realm: angels, gods, Thal’Azur.
Home of White Wolves seen as luminous pattern keepers.
Post redemption state of Lucifer.

P7_Shadow.name: Shadow
physics: Contains kernels of projections from other planes, what they erase or deny.
High entropy pockets that are still structured enough to persist.
Acts as a buffer to prevent direct collapse into Void.
story_mapping: Hell and self made prisons of guilt.
Torments generated by souls and contained by Lucifer.
Dark Wolves as gravity memory aspects when experienced as terror or abyss.

P8_Void.name: Void
physics: Contains information in a maximally unstructured, uncorrelated form.
No persistent patterns, no relational identity.
Acts as the entropy ocean beneath all planes.
story_mapping: True oblivion.
Primordial dark before light.
Sea of fragments from lost souls and failed patterns.

external_wave_examples: Gravitational waves from catastrophic cosmic events.
Deliberate interventions from Divine Core or Celestial planes.
void_mechanics.recompression_effect: Coherent external waves can locally lower entropy and compress noise into new structured patterns.
possible_outcomes: Formation of new proto agents (new souls, gods, monsters).
Spawn of new subplanes or pocket worlds.
Partial reassembly of remnants from previously lost beings.

P9_Divine_Core.name: Divine_Core
P9_Divine_Core.role: Architectural source that defines and relates all other planes.
physics: Holds the full rule set of existence.
All other planes map uniquely into it.
Not necessarily all loving or all knowing, but structurally central.
story_mapping: The God Archetype / Creator.
Operating system of the universe.
Target of the angelic rebellion and the ambitions of Architects.
